title: Listening - Part 2
description: For each question, choose the correct answer.
instructions: You will hear six short extracts. For questions 8–13, choose the answer (A, B or C) which fits best according to what you hear.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a holiday cottage.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: Have you booked the cottage for your holiday? || Man: Yes. I wanted somewhere near the beach, but those places were too expensive. || Woman: So where is this one? || Man: [8]It's a few kilometres inland, but it has bikes we can borrow, so getting to the beach should still be easy[/8]. That's why I chose it. || Woman: Maybe you can tell me more about it tomorrow, when you've had time to think. || Man: Good point. I suppose it's one of those things you only understand after trying it yourself.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Have you booked the cottage for your holiday?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Yes. I wanted somewhere near the beach, but those places were too expensive.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: So where is this one?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: It's a few kilometres inland, but it has bikes we can borrow, so getting to the beach should still be easy. That's why I chose it.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Maybe you can tell me more about it tomorrow, when you've had time to think.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good point. I suppose it's one of those things you only understand after trying it yourself.

questions.question: Why did the man choose the cottage?

options.A: It provides transport for reaching the beach.
options.B: It is directly beside the beach.
options.C: It was the most expensive option.

questions.explanation: He says the cottage has bikes they can borrow, so getting to the beach should be easy.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a new colleague.
extracts.audio_script: Man: How's your new colleague settling in? || Woman: Very well. She doesn't know all our systems yet, but she asks sensible questions. || Man: That's a good sign. || Woman: Yes, and [9]she stayed late yesterday to help me finish a report, even though it wasn't really her responsibility[/9]. I think she'll be great to work with. || Man: Good point. I suppose it's one of those things you only understand after trying it yourself. || Woman: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: How's your new colleague settling in?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Very well. She doesn't know all our systems yet, but she asks sensible questions.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: That's a good sign.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, and she stayed late yesterday to help me finish a report, even though it wasn't really her responsibility. I think she'll be great to work with.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Good point. I suppose it's one of those things you only understand after trying it yourself.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

questions.question: What does the woman say about her new colleague?

options.B: She is willing to help others.

questions.explanation: She says the colleague stayed late to help with a report that was not her responsibility.

extracts.context: You will hear two people talking about an airport journey.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Did you get to the airport easily? || Woman: Not really. The train was on time, but the shuttle bus from the station was full. || Man: Oh no. || Woman: Yes, [10]we had to wait for the next bus, and by the time we reached check-in there was a huge queue[/10]. We still caught the flight, but it was stressful. || Woman: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Did you get to the airport easily?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Not really. The train was on time, but the shuttle bus from the station was full.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Oh no.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Yes, we had to wait for the next bus, and by the time we reached check-in there was a huge queue. We still caught the flight, but it was stressful.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: That sounds sensible. It's always easier when you know what to expect before you make a final decision.

questions.question: What made the airport journey stressful?

options.C: They had to wait for transport to the terminal.

questions.explanation: She says the first shuttle bus was full and they had to wait for the next one.

extracts.context: You will hear a man telling a friend about a cooking competition.
extracts.audio_script: Woman: How did the cooking competition go? || Man: Better than expected. I didn't win, but I wasn't upset. || Woman: Really? || Man: No. [11]The judge explained exactly what I could improve, especially how to make the sauce lighter[/11]. That advice was more useful than a prize, honestly. || Man: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first. || Woman: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: How did the cooking competition go?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Better than expected. I didn't win, but I wasn't upset.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Really?

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: No. The judge explained exactly what I could improve, especially how to make the sauce lighter. That advice was more useful than a prize, honestly.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: I see what you mean. Sometimes those small details matter more than people expect at first.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

questions.question: What did the man value most about the competition?

options.A: getting useful comments from the judge

questions.explanation: He says the judge explained what he could improve, and the advice was very useful.

extracts.context: You will hear two friends talking about a local newspaper.
extracts.audio_script: Man: Do you still read the local newspaper? || Woman: Sometimes. I like the sports pages, but the website is quicker for breaking news. || Man: So why buy the paper? || Woman: [12]I mainly get it for the interviews with local people, because you don't find those stories anywhere else[/12]. They make the town feel more interesting. || Woman: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully. || Man: Anyway, let me know what happens, because I'm interested to hear how it goes next time.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Do you still read the local newspaper?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Sometimes. I like the sports pages, but the website is quicker for breaking news.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: So why buy the paper?

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: I mainly get it for the interviews with local people, because you don't find those stories anywhere else. They make the town feel more interesting.

dialogue.speaker: woman
dialogue.text: Well, I hope it works out, because it sounds as if you've thought about it carefully.

dialogue.speaker: man
dialogue.text: Anyway, let me know what happens, because I'm interested to hear how it goes next time.

questions.question: Why does the woman buy the local newspaper?

options.C: It has better breaking news than the website.

questions.explanation: She says she buys it for interviews with local people that are not found elsewhere.

extracts.context: You will hear a woman talking about a craft class.
extracts.audio_script: Speaker: I went to a craft class where we made wooden picture frames. The teacher showed each step clearly, and the materials were already prepared for us. I was pleased with my frame, but [13]the class finished later than advertised, so I missed the bus I had planned to take home[/13]. Next time I'll check the times more carefully. || Speaker: I told a friend about it later, and she said she had experienced something very similar.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I went to a craft class where we made wooden picture frames. The teacher showed each step clearly, and the materials were already prepared for us. I was pleased with my frame, but the class finished later than advertised, so I missed the bus I had planned to take home. Next time I'll check the times more carefully.

dialogue.speaker: speaker
dialogue.text: I told a friend about it later, and she said she had experienced something very similar.

questions.question: What problem did the woman have after the class?

options.A: She did not finish her picture frame.
options.C: She missed her planned bus home.

questions.explanation: She says the class finished later than advertised, so she missed the bus she planned to take.
